seo.og_description: Single-Family — 3 bed / 2.5+ bath / 3,800 sq ft. Offered at $599,000. Presented by Carrie Billeaud, REALTOR®, eXp Realty.

copy.hero_tagline: A gracious brick-and-white colonial on five wooded acres in the heart of Acadiana
overview_paragraphs: Set well back from the road behind an expanse of manicured lawn, this two-story colonial announces itself with quiet confidence — a columned portico, gabled roof, and brick chimney rising against the white-and-red-brick facade. A concrete drive traces the approach beneath a canopy of mature trees, the wooded perimeter framing the residence on all sides.

Inside, vaulted ceilings and hardwood floors carry through generous living spaces anchored by a wood-manteled fireplace and white brick surround. Plantation shutters and glass doors temper the light; a chandeliered dining room opens through French doors to the grounds. The kitchen pairs granite countertops and a substantial dark island with stainless appliances, including a double oven, beneath pendant lighting.

Across 3,800 square feet, three bedrooms and two-and-a-half-plus baths include a master retreat with a soaking tub, separate glass-enclosed walk-in shower, and dual-sink vanity. Beyond the walls, five acres unfold into an outdoor realm of covered pavilions, an outdoor kitchen, a pergola-shaded patio, and a screened porch with a swing bed overlooking the trees.
copy.pull_quote: Five acres of open lawn and shade trees, ordered around a home built for gathering — indoors and out.

feature_groups.title: The Residence
items: Vaulted-ceiling living spaces with wood-manteled fireplace and white brick surround
Hardwood floors, plantation shutters, and abundant natural light
Chandeliered dining room with French doors to the grounds
Granite kitchen with dark center island, stainless appliances, and double oven

feature_groups.title: Private Quarters
items: Master suite with upholstered headboard, shuttered windows, and hardwood floors
Master bath with soaking tub and separate glass-enclosed walk-in shower
Dual-sink marble vanity beneath an oversized framed mirror
Walk-in closet with integrated shelving and lighting

feature_groups.title: The Grounds & Outbuildings
items: Five acres of manicured lawn ringed by mature shade trees
Covered outdoor kitchen and multiple beamed pavilions
Pergola-shaded concrete patio and screened porch with swing bed
Carports, wood storage buildings, and a decorative garden pond feature

location_paragraphs: 1006 Carla Drive sits within St. Martin Parish in the heart of Louisiana's Acadiana region, where Saint Martinville's small-town character meets the open countryside. The five-acre parcel offers a rural setting with a wooded perimeter, yet remains within reach of the broader Lafayette area's shopping, dining, and services.

The grounds themselves define the address: expansive lawn, mature trees, and generous outdoor living structures create a private, self-contained retreat set back from the road along a landscaped concrete drive.
location_points: Saint Martinville, St. Martin Parish, Louisiana (70582)
Situated in the Acadiana region of south Louisiana
Five-acre parcel with a wooded perimeter for privacy
Set back from the road along a landscaped concrete driveway
Within reach of the greater Lafayette area's amenities
Expansive open lawn shaded by mature trees
Multiple covered outdoor structures and outbuildings on site
Single-family colonial residence on a large rural lot
copy.cta_sub: 1006 Carla Drive is available to tour by appointment. To see the home for yourself, contact Carrie Billeaud at eXp Realty — 337-258-5379.

media.hero_alt: Front facade of two-story white and red brick colonial home with columned portico, gabled roof, brick chimney, landscaped beds, and manicured lawn.
